page_metadata.biotools__summary: HEMnet is a deep learning automated cancer diagnosis software using molecular labelling to improve pathological annotation of Haematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) stained tissue.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HEMnet is a deep learning automated cancer diagnosis software using molecular labelling to improve pathological annotation of Haematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) stained tissue.
